topic.name: Equine legal corpus (fixture case)
topic.description: Fixture sources for corpus coverage tests and local workflow runs.

sources.title: Fixture — direct equine duty
sources.text: Article 1. Operators keeping animals of the equine species shall record each animal in the national database within 14 days.

sources.title: Fixture — equidae synonym
sources.text: Article 2. Keepers must identify all equidae individually before movement.

sources.title: Fixture — movement context (not species-specific)
sources.text: Article 3. Competent authorities may restrict movements of kept terrestrial animals during disease control operations.

sources.title: Fixture — bovine-only list item (excluded from equine corpus)
sources.text: Article 4. For kept animals of the bovine species, the competent authority shall verify ear tags.

equine_corpus.exclusion_reason: Species-only provision for bovidae; no equine hook in text.

narrative.title: Equine corpus fixture
narrative.summary: Minimal sources for automated corpus coverage tests; not a complete legal set.

run_notes: equine_corpus_fixture_case.json — for tests and build-equine-corpus --extraction-mode heuristic.
